title: cyperus steudneri
intro: Cyperus steudneri, also known as Steudner's papyrus or lesser papyrus, is a type of aquatic plant belonging to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). Traditionally, Cyperus steudneri has been used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and urinary problems. Cyperus steudneri can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and its extracts have also been used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments.
